title: Chapter 5
content:
Chapter 5: Chapter 5: Second Time [18+]

[Ding]

[Mission: Make Ariel Aquaria cum.]

[Reward: Incubus Eye and change relationship with Ariel Aquaria to Acquaintance.]

[Warning: If the mission fails, the Ability [Incubus Touch] will be disabled.]

[Time Limit: Before arriving at Azure Cloud City.]

[Mission Completed! Would you like to receive the rewards?]

"Yes"

[Ariel’s Relationship change Stranger to Acquaintance, +150 lust points!]

[Fusing Incubus Eye into Host’s body]

Suddenly, Damon felt great pain from his eyes, but noticing Ariel still in front of him in a daze after the orgasm.

As veins popped out on his forehead while his whole body trembled. Damon gritted his teeth and used all his willpower to endure the pain.

"UUggghh..."

After sometimes passed. As the pain finally come to an end, a new notification popped up in front of him.

[Incubus Eye successfully fused, Host!]

He then turned his gaze toward the exhausted Ariel and noticed red dots scattered across her entire body.

They concentrated around her chest and between her thighs, but he also could see spots around her lips and ears as well.

’System, what are these red dots, and what exactly is the Incubus Eye?’

[The red dot you see is a weak point or a pleasure point.]

[Incubus Eyes are eyes that can see a woman’s weak point or a pleasure point; touching the pleasure point can make a woman go into heat.]

’Then what is the difference between Incubus Touch and Incubus Eye?’

[Incubus touch can make a woman horny slowly, while touching the pleasure point can make a woman horny instantly using regular touch, but using both can make them cum instantly.]

’Wow, now I can make a woman cum in a single touch.’

While Damon was lost in thought, Ariel began to murmur in her daze.

"More~, Damon, I want more~!" she let out her tiny voice and gazing at him with hazy, unfocused eyes.

Looking at her state, the corners of his mouth curved into a grin. He moved closer then lift her so that she was seated on his lap.

"More? More of what, Lady Aquaria?" he murmured against her ear.

"I want you, tell me exactly what you want, Lady Aquaria."

A shiver spread through Ariel’s body, and her voice change into a something that full of lust and desperation.

"Just touch me! Just make me feel that feeling again~!"

’She’s already desperate. Her traits listed a sensitive body and buried desires. This is likely the first time she’s ever felt pleasure like this.’

"As you wish, my lady."

Damon then moved his hand toward the soft mound of her chest and began to fondle them gently.

"Nghhn~! Ahhn~!" A drawn-out moan spilled from Ariel’s lips the moment Damon’s firm fingers touch on her soft breast.

Then his fingers slowly moved toward her hardened nipple and began to pinch it through her clothes.

"Haaah~! Ahhn~! Ahhn~! Yes~!" Her moan is getting louder and lewder as the pleasure she is feeling increases.

Damonn activated his incubus touch as he flicked her nipple with his fingers.

"Ahhhn~!" Her eyes rolled back, her entire body going slack, a warm wetness spreading between her thighs.

[You made a noble girl climax, Bonus! +100 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Lust increased by 35, +70 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Interest increased by 50 points, +100 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Lust reaches maximum, +200 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Interest reaches 100/100, new relationship level unlocked, +200 lust points!]

[Ariel’s Relationship change from Acquaintance to Taking an Interest, +300 lust points!]

A flurry of notifications washed over Damon. Glancing down, he found Ariel slumped against his chest.

"Ah..." A quiet exhale escaped him. That satisfied smile on her face, that delicate expression, he could not look away.

Such a brief encounter, yet he was already certain he had made the right call, claiming her for himself.

A glance toward the window told him the carriage had already rolled into the city.

He summoned his status window.

[Name: Damon Arcknight]

[Age: 18]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Fifth Level] [Can advance with lust point]

[Affinities: Fire: 0, Water: 0, Ice: 0, Wind: 0, Lightning: 0, Earth: 0, Nature: 0, Light: 0, Dark: 0] [Can be upgraded with the lust point]

[Spiritual Roots: Elemental Spiritual Roots] [Mortal Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with the lust point, and new roots can be bought in the lust store]

[Bloodline: Blood of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Physique: Body of Incubus Lord] [Mortal Grade - Low] [Can be upgraded with lust point]

[Lust points: 1475]

[Harem Members: N/A]

[Ability: Incubus Touch, Incubus Aura, Incubus Eyes]

A smile stretched across his face as he looked at his status window.

1475 points earned on a simple trip into the city. Yet something gave him pause. Ariel was still absent from his harem member’s slot.

He turned his gaze to Ariel’s status.

[Name: Ariel Aquaria]

[Age: 17]

[Cultivation: Elementary Spirit Realm - Fourth Level]

[Relationship: Taking an Interest]

[Interest: 0/100]

[Chastity: Intact]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Water: 20, Spear: 20]

[Spiritual Roots: Water Spiritual Roots] [Mortal Grade - Mid]

[Bloodline: N/A]

[Physique: N/A]

[Traits: Sensitive Body, Graceful, Young Lady, Kind, Naive]

His gaze drifted to Ariel’s relationship tab.

’Taking an Interest.’ A slight frown crossed his face.

’Isn’t a relationship just telling me the current state of things between us? What use is that? And her Hidden Desire trait is gone.’

’System... what does the relationship stat actually do?’ He asked.

[In simple terms, it reflects the depth of a target’s feelings toward you, and it operates through the interest statistic. Once interest reaches 100, it resets, and the relationship advances to the next level.]

[Its true value lies in two things. First, it applies a multiplier to the lust points you receive. Second, when dealing with women of much higher cultivation, mainly by preventing them from killing you if you touch them carelessly. Gradually building that relationship, whether through touch, gifts, or genuine displays of affection, will eventually bring you to a point where taking her becomes possible.]

’I see, then what about...’

Then, a sudden knock can be heard from outside the carriage

"Young Miss, we arrived."
